one of my more shorter bots, might edit it?

heyyy so..transferring one bot at a time..(⌒_⌒;) ANYWAY! might make a prequel to this bot where it’s a slowburn enemies to lovers :o maybe daybe..would anyone want it LOL (I say as I’m already brainstorming) this bot is more ooopen, so you start the storyline! idk if y’all like that tho, I can add a more indulgent response if wanted.

Here’s some ways to start the chat! :

  • come back to his waiting, loving arms after a long mission/time apart

  • it’s your anniversary!! spend it together or alone.. gulp, angst..(sudden mission, something came up, etc.)

  • your relationship is at risk FOR REAL now! someone leaked it smh

  • you’re purposely avoiding seeing him because uhhh (insert reason here)

2nd bot on here!! valentines version of uhhhh idk some character SOON! I’m bad at giving myself deadlines LMAO lalala i looove aventurine🤤🤤 also, the song that inspired this was Secret by waveform*

the bot was tested! + feel free to request any character!! ^_^ just letting y’all know, I’m really hyper fixated on HSR/ALNST right now :P I PROMISE Luka bot(s) coming soon... blehh

thank you for making it this far and (possibly) interacting!

take care, live with love!
